base_url.description: YouTube Data API root. Also usable as a base URL override for tests/proxies.

api_key.description: YouTube Data API key, sent as the 'key' query parameter on every request. Never logged.

channel_ids.description: Comma-separated channel IDs, sent as the 'id' query parameter for the 'channels' stream. Omitted entirely when unset.

ids.description: Comma-separated video/playlist IDs, sent as the 'id' query parameter for the 'videos' and 'playlists' streams. Omitted entirely when unset.

mode.description: Runtime mode: live (default) or fixture for credential-free conformance.
